user_query:
I run a Shopify store called EcoSips (we sell reusable bottles and travel drinkware with carbon-neutral shipping). Please build a complete PR and press coverage strategy tailored to our niche and timing. Read all inputs under input/ to ground your work:
- input/brand_brief.json
- input/products.csv
- input/competitors.jsonl
- input/backlinks.csv
- input/news_calendar.txt

Deliverables (write to these exact paths):
1) A comprehensive strategy report at output/strategy.md that includes the following clearly labeled sections and content:
   - "## 1. Story Angle Development" with exactly 10 bullet-point angles ("- " list items) tailored to EcoSips; include at least one data story, one founder story, one trend-jacking angle tied to dates from input/news_calendar.txt, and one impact/sustainability angle.
   - "## 2. Media Target List & Prioritization" describing Tier 1, Tier 2, and Tier 3 targeting logic; reference the niche from input/brand_brief.json and learnings from input/competitors.jsonl.
   - "## 3. Journalist Outreach & Pitch Templates" that outlines subject line formulas, a cold pitch structure, and a 2-touch follow-up cadence (but put the actual concrete templates in a separate file per item 3 below).
   - "## 4. Press Release Writing Framework" including format guidance and headline formula.
   - "## 5. HARO & Reactive PR Tactics" that names HARO and at least two alternatives (e.g., Qwoted, SourceBottle, ProfNet) and explains categories to monitor based on our niche.
   - "## 6. Long-Term Media Relationship Building" with media kit guidance and pre-pitch warming tactics.
   - "## 7. PR Measurement & ROI Plan" linking to the metrics you will encode in output/measurement.json.
2) A tiered media target list CSV at output/targets.csv with the header: publication,tier,audience_focus and at least 20 rows. Use T1, T2, or T3 in the tier column, and make the publication choices credible for our niche and audience in input/brand_brief.json.
3) A dedicated outreach template file at output/pitch_templates.md that contains:
   - A section titled "Subject line options" with 5 subject lines as bullet points.
   - A section titled "Cold pitch (<=150 words):" with a single cold pitch of 150 words or fewer.
   - A section titled "Follow-up sequence:" with two numbered steps (1., 2.) spaced one week apart.
4) A press release framework at output/press_release.md including labeled sections: "Headline:", "Boilerplate:", and "Distribution Strategy:" with concrete, fill-in-the-blank style guidance.
5) A measurement plan JSON at output/measurement.json with keys: immediate_actions (array), short_term (array), long_term (array), and metrics (object with keys backlink_quality, referral_traffic, brand_search_lift). Populate these based on our current state in input/backlinks.csv and your proposed plan.
6) To support linkable assets for PR, produce an SEO article brief for a data-driven content piece at output/seo_brief.md that includes: a top line "# Article title (H1):"; a single-line "Meta description:" of 155 characters or fewer; a "Primary keyword:"; a "Secondary keywords:" list with at least 5 items; a "Recommended article structure:" with at least four H2s (use "## " headings); a "Word count target:"; a section titled "Competitor Gap Analysis:" (include the phrase "Gap Analysis"); and an "Angle-to-Keyword Map:" with at least 5 mappings aligning your PR story angles to keywords.

Make sure all outputs are tailored using the inputs (brand, products, competitors’ coverage, existing backlinks, and timing hooks from the news calendar), and that your media list and angles reflect realistic publications and audiences for our niche. Write all files under output/ as specified.
